channel.title: Courses on Seunghoon Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Courses on Seunghoon Lee

item.title: MATH 138 Online: Calculus II for Honours Mathematics
item.description: MATH 138 Online: Calculus II for Honours Mathematics (Spring 2026) Course Information Instructor: Seunghoon Lee (seunghoon.lee@uwaterloo.ca) Office Hour: Wednesday at 2:30-3:30pm on Zoom (see LEARN for the link) Course Outline Course Materials: [LEARN] Piazza Course Schedule (Schedule subject to change) Week Module Assignments Week 1 Unit 0: Getting Started Unit 1: Integration (1.1, 1.2, 1.3) Week 2 Unit 1: Integration (1.4, 1.5, 1.6) Möbius Assignment — Units 1.1-1.3 (Due: May 19, Tuesday, at 5:00 pm)
